CustomField.description: Opens a view where you can mark applicants as "Ready to Refer (Initial Backup), O" and send "RTV Submitted, Initial On Hold" emails to ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.formula:
HYPERLINK("/ui/list/FilterEditPage?id=00B3m000008xscO"
+"&fval1=%22"+
IF(CONTAINS(Name,"#")=TRUE, SUBSTITUTE(Name, "#", "%23"), Name)
+"%22" +"&fval2=%22Eligible%2C%20Pending%20Staff%20Action%22%2C%22Sent%20to%20Obtain%20a%20Mortgage%20Pre%2DApproval%22" +"&fval3=Pending" +"&fval4=Property%20Questionnaire" +"&fval5=False"+
"&retURL=%2Fa1I%3Ffcf%00B3m000008xscO"
, "Click Here")& "..........."& HYPERLINK( "https://cgph.lightning.force.com/flow/Outreach_Send_Initial_Backup_Emails?varPropID="& Id &"&retURL=https%3A%2F%2Fcgph.lightning.force.com%2Flightning%2Fr%2FHOMEtracker__Property__c%2F"& Id &"%2Fview", "NEW","_Top")
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Opens a view where you can mark applicants as "Ready to Refer (Initial Backup), O" and send "RTV Submitted, Initial On Hold" emails to ten applicants at a time.
CustomField.label: Send Initial Backup Emails, O
